properties.description:
At 7:22 PM EDT, a confirmed tornado was located over Decatur, moving east at 40 mph.

Hazard...Damaging tornado and golf ball size hail.
properties.instruction: Take cover now. Move underground if possible. Protect your head and stay away from windows.
properties.headline: Tornado Warning updated April 21 at 7:22PM EDT until April 21 at 8:00PM EDT by NWS Peachtree City GA
